title: Repurposed Structures - Better Witch Huts Compat
description: Change RS Witch Huts to be in Better Witch Hut's style
body:
Add this datapack to the game to add compatibility between Repurposed Structures and Yung's Better Witch huts. This datapack will make Repurposed Structures's witch huts be in the style of Better Witch Hut's Structure. 

 - Yung's Better Witch Huts mod can be obtained from here: https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-witch-huts

- Repurposed Structures mod can be obtained from here: https://modrinth.com/mod/repurposed-structures-forge


![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ePaZVJM4/images/4923bcb7e0b1e2bbf6391d6e17f7ba1567ba0d62.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ePaZVJM4/images/4923bcb7e0b1e2bbf6391d6e17f7ba1567ba0d62.png)


**Note:** for people using CurseForge Launcher to download datapacks, use mods like Global Data & Resourcespacks to automatically load in downloaded datapacks without needing to manually move the datapacks from the resourcepack folder to the correct folders. 
https://modrinth.com/mod/globalpacks
